text: Moving from a sterile corridor outside a glass meeting room into a vibrant, thought-provoking exhibit about research and development, I feel the contrast between order and creative exploration. The first scene made me feel like an observer on the threshold of controlled, practical activity. But now, surrounded by colorful displays and philosophical ideas, I sense a playful curiosity and a welcome invitation to contemplate new possibilities. The presence of ideas made visual sparks a feeling of anticipation and discovery within me.
